CARPE_DIEM.description: Escape the mountain safe house. Complete "Persona Non Grata" on any difficulty.

CITY_OF_LIGHTS.name: City of Lights
CITY_OF_LIGHTS.description: Complete "Bag and Drag" and "Iron Lady" on Veteran difficulty.

DANGER_CLOSE.name: Danger Close
DANGER_CLOSE.description: Take down a chopper with an AC-130 smoke grenade in "Bag and Drag."

DANGER_ZONE.name: Danger Zone
DANGER_ZONE.description: Buy all items from the Survival Air Support Armory.

DEER_IN_THE_HEADLIGHTS.name: Deer in the Headlights
DEER_IN_THE_HEADLIGHTS.description: Stab five stunned enemies in a row in the "Light 'Em Up" Special Ops mission.

DEFENSE_SPENDING.name: Defense Spending
DEFENSE_SPENDING.description: Buy all items from the Survival Equipment Armory.

DELIVER_THIS.name: Deliver This
DELIVER_THIS.description: Complete the "Special Delivery" Special Ops mission on Veteran difficulty.

DIAMOND_IN_THE_ROUGH.name: Diamond in the Rough
DIAMOND_IN_THE_ROUGH.description: Rescue the Russian President. Complete "Down the Rabbit Hole" on any difficulty.

DISCRIMINATING_BUYER.name: Discriminating Buyer
DISCRIMINATING_BUYER.description: Use exactly one of each care package in the "Special Delivery" Special Ops mission.

DONT_TREAD_ON_ME.name: Don't Tread on Me
DONT_TREAD_ON_ME.description: Complete the "Iron Clad" Special Ops mission on any difficulty.

DR0N3D.name: dr0n3d
DR0N3D.description: Complete the "Arctic Recon" Special Ops mission in under 3:30.

EMPRESSIVE.name: EMPressive…
EMPRESSIVE.description: Complete the "Kill Switch" Special Ops mission on Veteran difficulty.

FLIGHT_ATTENDANT.name: Flight Attendant
FLIGHT_ATTENDANT.description: Kill all 5 enemies during the zero-g sequence in "Turbulence."

FLYSWATTER.name: Flyswatter
FLYSWATTER.description: Destroy all helicopters in the "Vertigo" Special Ops mission.

FOR_WHOM_THE_SHELL_TOLLS.name: For Whom the Shell Tolls
FOR_WHOM_THE_SHELL_TOLLS.description: Destroy all targets during the mortar sequence with only 4 shells in "Back on the Grid."

FREQUENT_FLIER.name: Frequent Flyer
FREQUENT_FLIER.description: Defend the Russian President. Complete "Turbulence" on any difficulty.

GET_RICH_OR_DIE_TRYING.name: Get Rich or Die Trying
GET_RICH_OR_DIE_TRYING.description: Have $50,000 current balance in a Special Ops Survival game.

HANDLE_WITH_CARE.name: Handle with Care
HANDLE_WITH_CARE.description: Complete the "Special Delivery" Special Ops mission on any difficulty.

HELIPOCALYPSE_NOW.name: Helipocalypse
HELIPOCALYPSE_NOW.description: Destroy 6 helicopters in the "Kill Switch" Special Ops mission.

HIGH_ROLLER.name: High Roller
HIGH_ROLLER.description: Complete the "Iron Clad" Special Ops mission on Veteran difficulty.

I_LIVE.name: I Live
I_LIVE.description: Survive 1 wave in a Special Ops Survival game.

ICE_IN_YOUR_VEINS.name: Ice in Your Veins
ICE_IN_YOUR_VEINS.description: Complete the "Black Ice" Special Ops mission on Veteran difficulty.

JACK_THE_RIPPER.name: Jack the Ripper
JACK_THE_RIPPER.description: Melee 5 enemies in a row in Single Player or Special Ops.

KILL_BOX.name: Kill Box
KILL_BOX.description: Kill 20 enemies with the Chopper Gunner in a single run in "Return to Sender."

LIGHTS_OUT.name: Lights Out
LIGHTS_OUT.description: Complete the "Light 'Em Up" Special Ops mission on Veteran difficulty.

MENAGE_A_TROIS.name: Ménage à Trois
MENAGE_A_TROIS.description: Destroy 3 tanks with a single 105mm shot in "Iron Lady."

NEIN.name: Nein
NEIN.description: Kill 9 enemies with A-10 strafing runs in "Scorched Earth."

NO_ASSISTANCE_REQUIRED.name: No Assistance Required
NO_ASSISTANCE_REQUIRED.description: Complete a Special Ops Mission Mode game on Hardened or Veteran with no player getting downed.

NOT_A_SCRATCH.name: Not a Scratch
NOT_A_SCRATCH.description: Finish with your tank at full health in the "Iron Clad" Special Ops mission.

NOT_ON_MY_WATCH.name: Not on My Watch
NOT_ON_MY_WATCH.description: Rescue all the hostages in the Special Ops mission "Negotiator."

ONE_WAY_TICKET.name: One Way Ticket
ONE_WAY_TICKET.description: Make it to Westminster. Complete "Mind the Gap" on any difficulty.

ONE_FOUR_ONE.name: One-Four-One
ONE_FOUR_ONE.description: Complete the "Kill Switch" Special Ops mission on any difficulty.

OUT_OF_THE_FRYING_PAN.name: Out of the Frying Pan...
OUT_OF_THE_FRYING_PAN.description: Complete "Persona Non Grata", "Turbulence", and "Back on the Grid" on Veteran difficulty.

OVERACHIEVER.name: Overachiever
OVERACHIEVER.description: Earn 48 stars in Special Ops Mission Mode.

EUROPEAN_VACATION.name: Payback
EUROPEAN_VACATION.description: Complete "Mind the Gap", "Goalpost", and "Return to Sender" on Veteran difficulty.

PINNACLE.name: Pinnacle
PINNACLE.description: Complete the "Vertigo" Special Ops mission on Veteran difficulty.

REQUIEM.name: Requiem
REQUIEM.description: Escape the city. Complete "Blood Brothers" on any difficulty.

SANDSTORM.name: Sandstorm!
SANDSTORM.description: Assault the shipping company. Complete "Return to Sender" on any difficulty.

SERRATED_EDGE.name: Serrated Edge
SERRATED_EDGE.description: Finish a Juggernaut with a knife in Special Ops.

SHOTGUN_DIPLOMACY.name: Shotgun Diplomacy
SHOTGUN_DIPLOMACY.description: Complete the Special Ops mission "Negotiator" on any difficulty.

SIEGE.name: Siege
SIEGE.description: Complete the "Light 'Em Up" Special Ops mission on any difficulty.

SKILLED_NEGOTIATOR.name: Skilled Negotiator
SKILLED_NEGOTIATOR.description: Complete the Special Ops mission "Negotiator" on Veteran difficulty.

SLIPPERY_SLOPE.name: Slippery Slope
SLIPPERY_SLOPE.description: Complete the "Black Ice" Special Ops mission on any difficulty.

STAY_FROSTY.name: Stay Frosty
STAY_FROSTY.description: Complete the "Arctic Recon" Special Ops mission on any difficulty.

STORM_THE_CASTLE.name: Storm the Castle
STORM_THE_CASTLE.description: Discover Makarov's next move. Complete "Stronghold" on any difficulty.

STRIKE.name: Strike!
STRIKE.description: Kill 5 enemies with a single grenade in Single Player or Special Ops.

SUB_ZERO.name: Sub Zero
SUB_ZERO.description: Complete the "Arctic Recon" Special Ops mission on Veteran difficulty.

SURVIVOR.name: Survivor
SURVIVOR.description: Reach Wave 10 in each mission of Special Ops Survival mode.

TACTICIAN.name: Tactician
TACTICIAN.description: Earn 1 star in each mission of Special Ops Mission Mode.

THE_BEST_OF_THE_BEST.name: The Best of the Best
THE_BEST_OF_THE_BEST.description: Complete the campaign on Hardened or Veteran difficulty.

THE_BIG_APPLE.name: The Big Apple
THE_BIG_APPLE.description: Complete "Black Tuesday" and "Hunter Killer" on Veteran difficulty.

THE_DARKEST_HOUR.name: The Darkest Hour
THE_DARKEST_HOUR.description: Complete "Eye of the Storm", "Blood Brothers", and "Stronghold" on Veteran difficulty.

THIS_IS_MY_BOOMSTICK.name: This Is My Boomstick
THIS_IS_MY_BOOMSTICK.description: Kill 30 enemies with the XM25 in "Black Tuesday."

THIS_IS_THE_END.name: This is the End
THIS_IS_THE_END.description: Complete "Scorched Earth", "Down the Rabbit Hole", and "Dust to Dust" on Veteran difficulty.

TO_JUGGER_OR_TO_JUGGER_NAUT.name: To Jugger or to Jugger-Naut
TO_JUGGER_OR_TO_JUGGER_NAUT.description: Kill all juggernauts after they land on Veteran difficulty in the "Vertigo" Special Ops mission.

TOO_BIG_TO_FAIL.name: Too Big to Fail
TOO_BIG_TO_FAIL.description: Destroy the Jamming Tower. Complete "Black Tuesday" on any difficulty.

UNSTOPPABLE.name: Unstoppable
UNSTOPPABLE.description: Reach Wave 15 in each mission of Special Ops Survival mode.

UNTOUCHABLE.name: Untouchable
UNTOUCHABLE.description: Use only one self revive care package in the "Special Delivery" Special Ops mission.

UP_TO_NO_GOOD.name: Up to No Good
UP_TO_NO_GOOD.description: Infiltrate the village. Complete "Back on the Grid" on any difficulty.

VIVE_LA_REVOLUTION.name: Vive la Révolution!
VIVE_LA_REVOLUTION.description: Reach the church. Complete "Eye of the Storm" on any difficulty.

WELCOME_TO_WW3.name: Welcome to WW3
WELCOME_TO_WW3.description: Save the US Vice President. Complete "Goalpost" on any difficulty.

WELL_ALWAYS_HAVE_PARIS.name: We'll Always Have Paris
WELL_ALWAYS_HAVE_PARIS.description: Escape Paris with Volk. Complete "Iron Lady" on any difficulty.

WET_WORK.name: Wet Work
WET_WORK.description: Take back New York Harbor. Complete "Hunter Killer" on any difficulty.

WHAT_GOES_UP.name: What Goes Up...
WHAT_GOES_UP.description: Destroy all the choppers with only the UGV's grenade launcher in "Persona Non Grata."

WHO_DARES_WINS.name: Who Dares Wins
WHO_DARES_WINS.description: Complete the campaign on any difficulty.
